name: Claris FileMaker Data API
description: The FileMaker Data API allows web services to access databases hosted by FileMaker Server or FileMaker Cloud. It supports authentication, record CRUD operations, find requests, script execution, container data upload, and metadata retrieval. All responses are in JSON format.
